title: Add magnetometer calibration workflow and apply dark theme layout

requirements.text: Add a complete magnetometer calibration workflow in the IMU dashboard so users can calibrate the magnetometer from the UI and have the calibration applied to live magnetometer values and MARG orientation updates.

quotes: The magnetometer needs calibration function as well. Please include it.

acceptanceCriteria: In the Calibration tab, there is a dedicated Magnetometer calibration section with a clear start action, progress indication, and a way to cancel.
When magnetometer calibration completes, the computed calibration parameters are shown to the user (offsets and scales).
Magnetometer calibration can be reset back to defaults (offsets=0, scales=1) from the UI.
The calibrated magnetometer values are used consistently anywhere magnetometer data is displayed and anywhere magnetometer data is fed into the orientation filter when the magnetometer is available.
If the magnetometer is unavailable, the UI communicates that magnetometer calibration is disabled/unavailable and does not start calibration.

requirements.text: Apply a dark theme layout across the app (always-on dark styling) and ensure all major layout surfaces and components consistently use dark theme tokens.

quotes: Also please apply a dark theme layout for the app

acceptanceCriteria: On every load, the app renders in dark mode regardless of system preference, with no in-app theme toggle exposed.
App shell surfaces (header, main background, cards, footer) use theme variables/classes so the UI is consistently dark and readable.
No prominent light-theme backgrounds remain in the main app layout; contrast meets typical dark UI readability expectations (text, borders, muted text).

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (Shadcn components must be composed, not modified).
Do not edit immutable hook paths listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT (e.g., frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts(x), frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx).
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor; no new backend services.
nonGoals: Persisting calibration parameters to the backend or syncing them across devices/users (unless explicitly required later).
Adding third-party authentication providers (only Internet Identity is supported).
Adding new plotting/graphing features for sensor streams beyond what is necessary for calibration UX.
